name: DENTSPLY SIRONA Inc.
summary: Overview DENTSPLY SIRONA Inc. (Dentsply Sirona or the Company) is the worlds largest diversified manufacturer of professional dental products and technologies, with a 139-year history of innovation and service to the dental industry and a vision of improving oral health and continence care globally.
